findings.evidence: `Subcomodule.lean` lines 21-25 list the new API; `Subcoalgebra.lean` lines 21-28 have the analogous API/reference block, and the grep hit confirms the PR file only credits Sweedler: `Subcomodule.lean:29-30 This follows the standard definition ... See Sweedler`.
findings.fix: Add a reference in the module docstring noting that this API is adapted from/follows `TauCeti.Subcoalgebra`'s lightweight pattern, alongside the Sweedler citation.
findings.issue: The file closely follows the existing lightweight `TauCeti.Subcoalgebra` API and theorem order, and the PR description explicitly says so, but the code references only Sweedler.

summary: The informal mathematical source is credited, but the central formal pattern named in the PR description is not credited in the added file.
